message:
feat(interpreters,dispatch): support multi-output primitives and fix value_and_grad to return all gradients

- Rewrite eval_jaxpr_with_consts to use eval_primitive_multi and handle
  multi-output equations (e.g. QR returning both Q and R)
- Fix execute_grad to extend all gradient values instead of only the first
- Add expected field to UnexpectedOutputArity error for better diagnostics
- Add value_and_grad and multi-output QR tests
- Bump README test count badge to 1835
- Fix import ordering (Clippy lint)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
